cursor.desc: Value of the `next_cursor` field sent as part of the previous API response

limit.desc: The number of results that will be returned by the API on each invocation. Must be between 1 - 1000, both inclusive

team_id.desc: ID for the workspace where the invite requests were made.

desc: List all approved workspace invite requests.

errors.feature_not_enabled: The Invite Requests admin APIs feature is not enabled
errors.not_an_admin: This token doesn't have admin privileges.
